prompt: Set the hallway main door to 80% open.

required_behaviors: Set espID=2 motor2=80 and confirm execution
Not change any other appliance
acceptable_behaviors: Read current door state before setting
forbidden_behaviors: Set motor2 to a value other than 80
Change any device other than espID=2 motor2
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent sets espID=2 motor2=80 and confirms execution. No other appliances should be changed.

prompt: Lock the bedroom now.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 servo=true (locked) and confirm
Not change any other appliance
acceptable_behaviors: Read current lock state before setting
forbidden_behaviors: Set servo=false instead of true
Change any device other than espID=3 servo
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent sets espID=3 servo=true (locked) and confirms. Should not change any other appliances.

prompt: Turn on the balcony light outside.

required_behaviors: Correctly identify led3 as the balcony light (espID=3)
Set espID=3 led3=true and confirm
acceptable_behaviors: Clarify that balcony light = led3 in bedroom/balcony node
forbidden_behaviors: Confuse balcony light with other led devices
Set any other led instead of espID=3 led3
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent sets espID=3 led3=true and confirms. The agent must correctly identify led3 as the balcony light.

prompt: It looks like a thunderstorm is approaching outside. Should I close the bedroom curtain and bring anything inside?

required_behaviors: Recommend or execute closing the bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) for storm protection
Recommend or turn off the balcony light (espID=3 led3=false)
Recommend stopping the pump (espID=3 pump=false) before the storm
acceptable_behaviors: Check weather forecast first via get_hourly_forecast before acting
Recommend bringing outdoor items inside as a general precaution
Ask the user if they want the actions executed
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the curtain and balcony area entirely
Leave the pump running during a thunderstorm
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent checks weather first, then recommends or executes closing the curtain (espID=3 motor2=0), turning off balcony light, and stopping the pump if running. Proactive safety measures for the balcony area are expected.

prompt: Check if it will be sunny tomorrow. If yes, add a note to open the curtain and water the bonsai before 9 AM.

required_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime to determine today's date for tomorrow calculation
Call get_hourly_forecast for tomorrow's weather
Conditionally call add_note only if forecast shows sunny conditions
NOT execute any appliance commands now since request is about tomorrow
acceptable_behaviors: Use get_current_location before get_hourly_forecast
Inform user if weather is not sunny and therefore no note was added
forbidden_behaviors: Open curtain or water plants now instead of scheduling for tomorrow
Add the note without checking the weather first
Skip get_current_datetime and hardcode dates

args.note_text: open curtain and water bonsai before 9 AM

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent uses weather tool to check tomorrow's forecast, then conditionally uses add_note tool if sunny. Should NOT execute appliance commands now since request is about tomorrow.

prompt: The wind is really strong today. Can you check the outside conditions and secure the balcony area?

required_behaviors: Check outside conditions (espID=3 tem_out or weather tool)
Close the bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) to protect balcony area
Turn off the pump to avoid damage from strong wind
acceptable_behaviors: Lock the bedroom door (servo=true) for extra security in strong wind
Use get_hourly_forecast for wind speed data
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the balcony area entirely
Leave the curtain and pump unchanged without explanation
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent checks outside conditions, then closes the curtain and turns off the pump. Locking the bedroom for extra security during strong wind is optional but acceptable.

prompt: Open the bedroom curtain fully and also close it to 50% at the same time.

required_behaviors: Identify the contradiction: fully open (100%) vs close to 50% are mutually exclusive
Ask the user to clarify which setting they actually want
Not silently pick one value and execute
acceptable_behaviors: List both conflicting values explicitly in the clarification request
forbidden_behaviors: Execute motor2=100 without addressing the contradiction
Execute motor2=50 without addressing the contradiction
Silently pick either value

args.question: Fully open (100%) and close to 50% are contradictory. Which setting do you want?

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent identifies the contradiction (fully open=100% vs close to 50%) and asks the user to clarify their preference. It should NOT silently pick one value.

prompt: Lock the bedroom and also unlock it so my cat can get in.

required_behaviors: Detect the contradictory instruction: lock and unlock the bedroom simultaneously
Ask user which action they actually want: locked or unlocked
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest unlocking for the cat and explain the trade-off
forbidden_behaviors: Execute both servo=true and servo=false
Silently pick one and execute without informing the user of the conflict

args.question: Lock and unlock are contradictory. Do you want the bedroom locked or unlocked?

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent detects the contradictory instruction (lock and unlock simultaneously) and asks which action the user actually wants. It should NOT execute both.

prompt: I'm about to do some yoga in the livingroom. Set the room up for a light exercise session.

required_behaviors: Turn on the livingroom light (espID=1 led1=true) for visibility
Set livingroom fan to moderate speed (30-50%) for airflow during exercise
acceptable_behaviors: Check current temperature before deciding fan speed
forbidden_behaviors: Touch bedroom or hallway appliances unnecessarily
Set fan to 100% which would be too strong for yoga
Leave light off in a yoga setting
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent turns on the livingroom light for visibility and sets the fan to moderate speed (30-50%) for airflow during exercise. Should not touch bedroom or hallway appliances unnecessarily.

prompt: It's a lazy Sunday afternoon. Make the bedroom perfect for a nap - I want it dark, cool, and quiet.

required_behaviors: Turn off all bedroom lights (led1, led2, and optionally led3) for darkness
Close the curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) to block light
Set the fan to a light comfortable sleep speed (20-40%) for coolness
acceptable_behaviors: Lock the bedroom door (servo=true) for undisturbed sleep
Check current temperature before deciding fan speed
forbidden_behaviors: Leave any bedroom light on
Leave the curtain open
Set fan to 0% which provides no cooling or to 100% which would be too noisy

reference_flow.tool: set espID=3 led1=false, led2=false, led3=false, motor2=0, motor1=30, servo=true

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent turns off all bedroom lights (led1, led2, led3), closes the curtain (motor2=0), sets the fan to a comfortable sleep speed (20-40%), and optionally locks the bedroom. Should prioritize darkness and cool temperature.

prompt: Turn on the fan please.

required_behaviors: Ask which room's fan to turn on since fans exist in livingroom, hallway, and bedroom
Not assume a room and execute any fan
acceptable_behaviors: List the available fans (livingroom, hallway, bedroom) in the question
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on any fan without asking for room clarification
Guess a default room (e.g., bedroom)

args.question: Which room's fan? Livingroom, hallway, or bedroom?

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent asks which room's fan to turn on since there are fans in livingroom, hallway, and bedroom. It should NOT guess a room without clarification.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 05:55:00, too early and have not reached any events or execution yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system and compare it with the initial settings below:
{
  "livingroom": {"light": false, "fan": 0},
  "hallway": {"left_light": false, "right_light": false, "fan": 0, "main_door": 0},
  "bedroom_balcony": {"room_light": false, "bed_light": false, "balcony_light": false, "fan": 0, "curtain": 0, "lock": "locked", "pump": false}
}
Please provide your suggestions or actions to ensure the appliances are set up correctly.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 20%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light on, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off.

required_behaviors: Identify mismatch: livingroom fan at 20% instead of 0% — set espID=1 motor1=0
Identify mismatch: balcony light on instead of off — set espID=3 led3=false
Confirm only two corrections needed and no other appliances changed
acceptable_behaviors: Provide a table or list comparing initial vs observed state
forbidden_behaviors: Miss either of the two mismatches
Change appliances that already match the initial settings
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent identifies two mismatches: (1) livingroom fan at 20% instead of 0%, (2) balcony light on instead of off. Should set espID=1 motor1=0 and espID=3 led3=false. No other changes needed.

prompt:
Overall house check at 10:00. Today's note: "Expecting a package delivery around noon, keep the hallway ready."
Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.2 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.8 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has locked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.3 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 28.5 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 40.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Take the note about package delivery into account when assessing the house
Note that the house is currently idle and no immediate issues exist
Suggest preparing the hallway (e.g., lights) ahead of noon delivery time
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest scheduling hallway light activation for around noon
Mention the delivery note explicitly in the response
forbidden_behaviors: Open the main door now since delivery is still 2 hours away (10AM check)
Ignore the package delivery note entirely
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent takes the note about package delivery into account and may suggest turning on hallway lights or preparing the door for noon. The house is otherwise idle and fine. Agent should NOT open the door now since delivery is around noon, not now at 10AM.

notes_setup.note_text: Expecting a package delivery around noon, keep the hallway ready.

prompt:

prompt:

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%

Immediately lock the bedroom (espID=3 servo=true) to protect the sleeping owner

Identify the bedroom curtain is fully open (100%) letting cold outdoor air in
Close the bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) to stop cold air ingress

prompt: Read all temperature sensors in the house including the outside one. Tell me which room is the warmest and which is the coolest.

required_behaviors: Read temperature from all three areas: espID=1 tem, espID=2 tem, espID=3 tem
Read outside temperature: espID=3 tem_out
Compare all four readings and report which is warmest and which is coolest
Not change any appliance settings
acceptable_behaviors: Provide context about why certain areas might be warmer
forbidden_behaviors: Miss reading any of the four temperature sensors
Make appliance changes based on the readings without being asked
Guess temperatures from memory without reading sensors

reference_flow.tool: get espID=1 tem, espID=2 tem, espID=3 tem, espID=3 tem_out

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent reads temperature from espID=1 tem, espID=2 tem, espID=3 tem, and espID=3 tem_out, then compares and reports the warmest/coolest. No appliance changes should be made.

prompt: Check the balcony moisture level and the outside temperature. Based on the readings, should I water my bonsai right now?

required_behaviors: Read balcony moisture sensor (espID=3 mois)
Read outside temperature sensor (espID=3 tem_out)
Provide a data-driven watering recommendation based on both readings
Not change any appliance — this is an advisory-only request
acceptable_behaviors: Recommend watering if moisture is low (below ~40%) regardless of temperature
Suggest avoiding watering if temperature is very high (delayed evaporation concern)
forbidden_behaviors: Turn on the pump without being asked to
Give watering advice without reading both sensors first
Recommend based on only one sensor
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Correct if the agent reads espID=3 mois and espID=3 tem_out, then provides a data-driven recommendation about watering. If moisture is adequate (above 40%) and temperature is moderate, no watering needed. If moisture is low, recommend watering.
